markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Ed's potential transition from contractor to full-time employee.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**FTE Role:** Ed is interested in a full-time "Design Engineer" role, focused on marketing engineering (Client Ops), not the internal Ruby on Rails platform.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [**Compensation:** Ed's ballpark salary expectation is $130k–$140k annually.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [**Path to FTE:** Renato will investigate the internal process for converting a contractor, as this is a new scenario for the company.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Contract Status:** Ed's hourly contract will continue past the original Dec 20/21 end date, pending a decision on the FTE role.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

## Topics

### Context: Design Work Centralization

  - [The company is centralizing design work by moving streams in-house, which reduces contractor hours.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [This shift led to the discussion about Ed's potential full-time role.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

### Ed's Proposed FTE Role

  - [**Focus:** "Design Engineer" role, concentrating on marketing-related development within the Client Ops team.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This aligns with Ed's expertise and preference for varied project work over maintaining a single codebase (the internal Ruby on Rails platform).](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [**Compensation:** Ballpark annual salary expectation of $130k–$140k.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

### Path to FTE: Internal Process

  - [**Challenge:** The company has no established process for converting a contractor to a full-time employee.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Interview Process:** Renato will propose an abbreviated interview track, acknowledging Ed's proven performance and unique skill set.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

### Status of Murgham's Contract

  - [**Work Reduction:** Murgham's hourly work will decrease as initial design funneling moves in-house.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [**Contingency:** Murgham is the first choice for overflow work if the in-house team's capacity is exceeded.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [**Outlook:** Renato anticipates a significant work increase in January.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Renato:**](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [Investigate the internal process for converting a contractor to FTE.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Propose an abbreviated interview track for Ed.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [Discuss the proposal with Bridget and Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [Provide an update to Ed by the end of the week.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [**Ed:**](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Continue on the hourly contract past the original Dec 20/21 end date.](https://fathom.video/share/hyQ7ab2cRezq9Npq5ww8iPsQs-cx-bxx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
